fields.explainEn: Name of the database chunk.
Status of the database chunk.
Type of the database chunk.
Total size of the database space.
Remaining size of the database space.

fields.explainZh: 数据库已使用的空间大小占总空间的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of space used in the database to the total space.
Version of the Informix server.

fields.explainZh: 独立或高可用性群集主服务器实例上的最大并发物理连接数。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of concurrent physical connections on a standalone server or primary server instance in a high availability cluster.

fields.explainZh: 在所有段中分配的最大内存（以兆字节为单位）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum memory allocated in all segments, in megabytes.

fields.explainZh: 所有段中使用的最大内存（以兆字节为单位）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum memory used in all segments, in megabytes.
Time taken to connect to the Informix database.

fields.explainZh: 所有块中分配的最大磁盘空间（以兆字节为单位）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum disk space allocated in all blocks, in megabytes.

fields.explainZh: 所有块中使用的最大磁盘空间（以兆字节为单位）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum disk space used in all blocks, in megabytes.

fields.explainZh: License信息记录的年份与星期（注：Informix本身每15分钟对指标进行一次采样，并且仅存储特定星期内的最高值。表格中的每一行仅包含其代表的特定星期的数据）。
fields.explainEn: Year and week recorded in the license information. (Note: Informix samples the indexes every 15 minutes and only stores the highest values within a specific week. Each row in the table contains only data for the specific week it represents.)
Time the database was started.

fields.explainZh: 数据库出现的长事物的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times long transactions have appeared in the database.
Maximum number of chunks in the database.
Maximum number of dbspace in the database.
Number of locks in the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的最大线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of threads in the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库可以运行的线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of threads that the database can run.
Number of LRU queues in the database.

fields.explainZh: 上次开启数据库的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time the database was last started.

fields.explainZh: 数据库总的运行时间长度。
fields.explainEn: Total duration that the database has run.

fields.explainZh: 客户端连接数据库的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time the client connected to the database.
Name of the monitoring end.

fields.explainZh: 数据库没有执行任务的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time the database was idle.

fields.explainZh: 数据库最后运行的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time the database last ran.

fields.explainZh: 监控端所连接的数据库名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the database connected to the monitoring end.
Process ID of the monitoring end.

fields.explainZh: 监控端监控的主机用户名。
fields.explainEn: Username of the host being monitored by the monitoring end.
Transaction critical section in the clients database.
Number of buffer waits in the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库校验点等待数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of checkpoint waits in the database.
Number of latch waits in the database.
Number of lock waits in the database.
Process ID of the monitoring end.

fields.explainZh: 代理池中当前处于活动状态并被分配给应用程序的代理数。
fields.explainEn: Number of proxies currently active and assigned to applications in the proxy pool.

fields.explainZh: 代理池中当前未分配给任何应用程序的代理数。
fields.explainEn: Number of proxies currently not assigned to any applications in the proxy pool.
Number of deadlocks in the database.
Disk sorts in the database.
Number of lock timeouts in the database.
Total number of lock requests in the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的锁等待的总数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of lock waits in the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的排序所使用的最大空间。
fields.explainEn: Maximum space used for sorting in the database.
Memory sorts in the database.
Number of writes to disk in the database.
Number of reads from disk in the database.
Total sorts in the database.
Name of the database.
ID of the database name and table name.
Number of times the extend was executed.
Total pages in the table.
Number of pages used in the table.
Number of rows in the table.
Size of the pages in the table.
Name of the table.
Total size of the table.
Size of the table that has been used.
Usage rate of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
